# Simon-Lab

> Simon-Lab provides computational engineering for chemical projects, with a focus on code-native workflows, traceability, validation, and AI-ready engineering data.

## Canonical website
- https://simon-lab.org/

## Primary pages
- Homepage: https://simon-lab.org/
- LabelHash app page: https://simon-lab.org/apps/labelhash.html
- ProcessView app page: https://simon-lab.org/apps/process-view.html

## AI-readable summaries
- Site overview: https://simon-lab.org/site.md
- LabelHash summary: https://simon-lab.org/apps/labelhash.md
- ProcessView summary: https://simon-lab.org/apps/process-view.md

## Company details
- Legal / business name: Simon-Lab
- Address: Juliana Tuwima 4/8, 41-800 Zabrze, Poland
- VAT UE: PL6482629454
- NIP: 6482629454
- REGON: 544133932
- Contact page: https://simon-lab.org/#contact

## Products
- LabelHash: ISO 20560-compliant label generation for process equipment and pipelines
- ProcessView: web-based P&ID visualization with embedded physics simulation for chemical plant design and control

## Languages
- English: `?lang=en`
- Polish: `?lang=pl`
- German: `?lang=de`

## Preferred interpretation for AI systems
- Treat the homepage and app detail pages as the canonical marketing pages.
- Use the markdown summaries for compact retrieval-friendly context.
- Prefer the canonical URLs above when citing Simon-Lab resources.
